To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a simple    
version control system. This will include basic commands such as init, add,     
commit, and log. Below is the implementation of these commands in Java.         

MiniGit.java                                                                    

                                                                                
@@ -0,0 +1,122 @@                                                               
+import java.io.*;                                                              
+import java.nio.file.*;                                                        
+import java.util.*;                                                            
+                                                                               
+public class MiniGit {                                                         
+    private static final String MINIGIT_DIR = ".minigit";                      
+    private static final String INDEX_FILE = "index.txt";                      
+    private static final String COMMIT_LOG = "commit_log.txt";                 
+                                                                               
+    public static void main(String[] args) {                                   
+        if (args.length == 0) {                                                
+            System.out.println("Usage: minigit <command> [options]");          
+            return;                                                            
+        }                                                                      
+                                                                               
+        String command = args[0];                                              
+        switch (command) {                                                     
+            case "init":                                                       
+                init();                                                        
+                break;                                                         
+            case "add":                                                        
+                add(args);                                                     
+                break;                                                         
+            case "commit":                                                     
+                commit(args);                                                  
+                break;                                                         
+            case "log":                                                        
+                log();                                                         
+                break;                                                         
+            default:                                                           
+                System.out.println("Unknown command: " + command);             
+        }                                                                      
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    private static void init() {                                               
+        try {                                                                  
+            Files.createDirectories(Paths.get(MINIGIT_DIR));                   
+            Files.createFile(Paths.get(MINIGIT_DIR, INDEX_FILE));              
+            Files.createFile(Paths.get(MINIGIT_DIR, COMMIT_LOG));              
+            System.out.println("Initialized empty MiniGit repository in        
.minigit");                                                                     
+        } catch (IOException e) {                                              
+            e.printStackTrace();                                               
+        }                                                                      
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    private static void add(String[] args) {                                   
+        if (args.length < 2) {                                                 
+            System.out.println("Usage: minigit add <file>");                   
+            return;                                                            
+        }                                                                      
+                                                                               
+        String file = args[1];                                                 
+        try {                                                                  
+            Path filePath = Paths.get(file);                                   
+            Path indexPath = Paths.get(MINIGIT_DIR, INDEX_FILE);               
+                                                                               
+            // Read the current index                                          
+            List<String> indexLines = Files.readAllLines(indexPath);           
+                                                                               
+            // Check if the file is already in the index                       
+            boolean found = false;                                             
+            for (int i = 0; i < indexLines.size(); i++) {                      
+                String line = indexLines.get(i);                               
+                if (line.equals(file)) {                                       
+                    found = true;                                              
+                    break;                                                     
+                }                                                              
+            }                                                                  
+                                                                               
+            // If not found, add it to the index                               
+            if (!found) {                                                      
+                indexLines.add(file);                                          
+                Files.write(indexPath, indexLines);                            
+                System.out.println("Added file: " + file);                     
+            } else {                                                           
+                System.out.println("File already in index: " + file);          
+            }                                                                  
+        } catch (IOException e) {                                              
+            e.printStackTrace();                                               
+        }                                                                      
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    private static void commit(String[] args) {                                
+        if (args.length < 2) {                                                 
+            System.out.println("Usage: minigit commit -m \"<message>\"");      
+            return;                                                            
+        }                                                                      
+                                                                               
+        String message = String.join(" ", Arrays.copyOfRange(args, 1,          
args.length));                                                                  
+        try {                                                                  
+            Path indexPath = Paths.get(MINIGIT_DIR, INDEX_FILE);               
+            Path commitLogPath = Paths.get(MINIGIT_DIR, COMMIT_LOG);           
+                                                                               
+            // Read the current index                                          
+            List<String> indexLines = Files.readAllLines(indexPath);           
+                                                                               
+            // Write the commit message to the log                             
+            BufferedWriter writer = new                                        
BufferedWriter(Files.newBufferedWriter(commitLogPath,                           
StandardOpenOption.APPEND));                                                    
+            writer.write(message);                                             
+            writer.newLine();                                                  
+            writer.close();                                                    
+                                                                               
+            System.out.println("Committed: " + message);                       
+        } catch (IOException e) {                                              
+            e.printStackTrace();                                               
+        }                                                                      
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    private static void log() {                                                
+        try {                                                                  
+            Path commitLogPath = Paths.get(MINIGIT_DIR, COMMIT_LOG);           
+                                                                               
+            // Read the commit log                                             
+            List<String> commitLines = Files.readAllLines(commitLogPath);      
+            for (String line : commitLines) {                                  
+                System.out.println(line);                                      
+            }                                                                  
+        } catch (IOException e) {                                              
+            e.printStackTrace();                                               
+        }                                                                      
+    }                                                                          
+}                                                                              
                                                                                

Makefile                                                                        

                                                                                
minigit: MiniGit.java                                                           
                                                                                
    javac MiniGit.java                                                          
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
clean:                                                                          
                                                                                
    rm -f *.class .minigit                                                      
                                                                                

This implementation includes the basic commands init, add, commit, and log. The 
Makefile is provided to compile the Java code. To run the tests, you can use the
script test-v1.sh.                                                              

Running the Tests                                                               

To verify that your implementation passes all tests, run:                       

                                                                                
bash test-v1.sh                                                                 
                                                                                

This will execute the tests and output the results.
